source.name: Material Design 3
source.license_notes: Use source links and summarized guidance only; site may require JavaScript for full content.

layout_rules: Use navigation drawers for top-level destinations in products with multiple sections.
Keep labels short and destinations stable.
Separate primary destinations from secondary settings/help items.
accessibility_notes: Active destination must be programmatically and visually clear.
Drawer open/close should preserve focus behavior.
implementation_hints: Use for mobile/tablet apps where bottom nav is insufficient.
Avoid using drawer as a dumping ground for unrelated actions.

quality.notes: Official Material page URL verified, but web text required JavaScript in this environment.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Material navigation drawers for multi-section app shells: stable top-level destinations, clear active item, separated utility links, and careful focus/open-close behavior.
